raw_consumer_statement:
I received a billing statement showing a charge of {$23.00} on XX/XX/XXXX. I then called the credit card company, explained that I would like more information on who submitted this charge. They said they would investigate it and contact me. We talked on the phone a few times, I can't make it any simpler, WHAT COMPANY SUBMITTED THOS CHARGE? 
They would not answer me, then sent me a letter dated XX/XX/XXXX saying they are investigating. Additional phone calls show they don't know what they are doing. 
I sent a letter to them on XX/XX/XXXX. They would call me, leave messages to call their main number with any questions. I can't keep playing this game. 
On XX/XX/XXXX they sent me another letter with a bunch of runaround and inaccurate information, saying I have not stated what I would like to do, and suggested that I contact the merchant. I DON'T KNOW WHO THE MERCHANT IS!!!
